page_content:
Prerequisite: MUED422.

Restriction: Must be in Music Education program.

Credit Only Granted for. MUED472 or MUED433.

Formerly: MUED472.

MUED473 Teaching General Music for Instrumentalists (2 Credits) Introduction to current trends, materials and approaches in general music instruction.

Prerequisite: MUED311; and MUED320.
